## FHIR Queries: Steroid-Induced Avascular Necrosis — Union Cohort

```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|312894000&clinical-status=active,recurrence,relapse&verification-status=confirmed
```

```
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|8640&status=active
```

---

### Query Breakdown

| Path | Resource | Code System | Code | Concept | Intent |
|------|----------|-------------|------|---------|--------|
| **A — Confirmed AVN** | `Condition` | SNOMED CT | `312894000` | Avascular necrosis of bone (disorder) | True positive AVN diagnoses |
| **C — At-Risk Population** | `MedicationRequest` | RxNorm | `8640` | Prednisone (ingredient) | Chronic corticosteroid exposure proxy |

---

### Design Notes

**Path A — Condition (AVN)**
- `clinical-status=active,recurrence,relapse` filters out resolved historical entries and avoids counting the same patient twice for an old, healed AVN episode
- `verification-status=confirmed` excludes differential or suspected diagnoses — critical for a case-finding query
- SNOMED `312894000` (*Avascular necrosis of bone*) is the canonical parent concept; implementations supporting SNOMED subsumption (`?code:below=`) will automatically capture drug-induced, steroid-induced, and site-specific child concepts (femoral head, humeral head, etc.)

**Path C — MedicationRequest (Prednisone)**
- RxNorm `8640` is the **ingredient-level** concept; it will match across all dose forms and strengths (tablets, solution, oral concentrate)
- `status=active` targets current prescriptions; drop this filter to include historical exposure
- **Expected over-capture is intentional and documented:** prednisone is prescribed across RA, SLE, asthma, IBD, transplant, and many other indications — the vast majority of this cohort will never develop AVN. This path requires downstream filtering (e.g., dose ≥ 20 mg/day AND duration > 3 months) to narrow to clinically meaningful AVN risk

---

### Recommended Refinements for Tighter Precision

```
# Subsumption search — catches all SNOMED child concepts of AVN
Condition?code:below=http://snomed.info/sct|312894000

# High-dose chronic prednisone via dosage context (non-standard; system-dependent)
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|8640&status=active&_has:MedicationStatement:medication:effective-period=ge90

# Expand to related corticosteroids in the same at-risk cohort
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|8640,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|3264,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1514151&status=active
# RxNorm 3264 = dexamethasone, 1514151 = methylprednisolone
```
